creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Nice to see v4 is now public. I'm testing this. As maintainer of the other two Unifi ports you're always welcome ask me if you have any questions in the future if you run into problems.

First impressions: I spotted a missing WWW in pkg-descr and there are some strange extra tabs probably from the submitter trying to make it align in their editor of choice. Nothing too critical. I'll post a svn patch after my testing is complete.

Just a reminder -- this needs to be added to LEGAL like the other unifi ports.
